creator: dada@pluto.tugraz.at
text:
Upgrade to the 2007-02-19 release.

Use the directory that is intended for third party `.m4' files, i.e.
the /usr/local/share/aclocal directory.
(Used to be /usr/local/share/autoconf-archive.)

The patch-Makefile.in has been removed (replaced by a Makefile.am patch)
and can be removed with `cvs rm'.
